name: skillselion-mcp
description: MCP server that gives your coding agent on-demand access to thousands of community-vetted Claude Code skills - search Skillselion and load_skill a real SKILL.md (plus its scripts/refs) mid-task. Ranked by installs + GitHub stars. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex & any MCP client.

scripts.test:live: node test/verbose.mjs && node test/relevance.mjs && node test/live.mjs

author: Skillselion (https://skillselion.com)
